notes:
- Conversation: opening a new conversation now jumps in instantly with a visible loading state instead of a blank wait.
- Updater: the update dialog shows its disclaimer at the bottom of the modal.
- Keep the Baidu manual-download entry visible.
- Release tooling: one-click macOS and Windows release flows (`bun run release:mac` / `release:win`) with automatic first-time vs. append detection.

Windows packages ship first for this version; the macOS updater entry is added afterward from the Mac build machine.
